general.name: cogimg
general.short: Coadded guider images appropriate for a given exposure so that we have a time-integrated PSF.
general.description: Coadded guider images appropriate for a given exposure so that we have a time-integrated PSF.

surveys.name: MaNGA
surveys.long: Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory
surveys.description: A wide-field optical spectroscopic IFU survey of extragalactic sources to study galaxy dynamics and kinematics

general.naming_convention: cogimg-[mjd]-[exposure].fits.gz where [mjd] is the MJD of observation, and [exposure] is the (zero-padded) 8-digit exposure number.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

hdu0.name: PRIMARY
hdu0.description: HDU0 contains the stacked flux image.

header.comment: Number of bits per data pixel
APO fMJD day at start of exposure
applied user supplied offset in RA, arcsec
applied user supplied offset in Dec, arcsec

header.value: FITS (Flexible Image Transport System) format is defined in 'Astronomy

header.comment: Image Extension created by MWRFITS v1.11
Image Extension created by MWRFITS v1.11
Binary table written by MWRFITS v1.11

EXISTS.name: EXISTS
EXISTS.description: True if the guide fiber exists, 'F' otherwise.

ENABLED.name: ENABLED
ENABLED.description: 'T' if the guide fiber's measurement is used in guiding.

GPROBEBITS.name: GPROBEBITS
GPROBEBITS.description: Bitmask indicating the classification of the guide fibers. Bit 2 means acquisition fibers. Bit 3 and 4 mean pre-focus and post-focus fibers which are used for focusing. The other fibers with GPROBEBITS=0 are in-focus fibers.

XFOCAL.name: XFOCAL
XFOCAL.description: X Position of the guide probe on the focal plane of the telescope.

YFOCAL.name: YFOCAL
YFOCAL.description: Y Position of the guide probe on the focal plane of the telescope.

RADIUS.name: RADIUS
RADIUS.description: Radius of the guide probe image on the detector. Each pixel is 0.428 arcsec.

XFERRULEOFFSET.name: XFERRULEOFFSET
XFERRULEOFFSET.description: Probably the X offset of the guide hole on the plate relative to the design position.

YFERRULEOFFSET.name: YFERRULEOFFSET
YFERRULEOFFSET.description: Probably the Y offset of the guide hole on the plate relative to the design position.

ROTSTAR2SKY.name: ROTSTAR2SKY
ROTSTAR2SKY.description: The angular rotation required to convert the star's position angle in the guide probe image to its PA angle in the sky.

FOCUSOFFSET.name: FOCUSOFFSET
FOCUSOFFSET.description: Focus offset of the guide probe.

FIBER_TYPE.name: FIBER_TYPE
FIBER_TYPE.description: Type of guide probe: ACQUIRE or GUIDE.

UGRIZ.name: UGRIZ
UGRIZ.description: ugriz magnitude of the star targeted.

FIBERID.name: FIBERID
FIBERID.description: Guide Probe ID (1-16, among them 3 and 11 are acquisition fibers.)

XCENTER.name: XCENTER
XCENTER.description: X coordinate of the guide probe's image in the guider camera

YCENTER.name: YCENTER
YCENTER.description: Y coordinate of the guide probe's image in the guider camera
